question_frequency.rationale: The Pair asked zero didactic questions. It immediately wrote the full solution and explained it after the fact. No teachable moments were surfaced as choices for the user.

question_quality.rationale: No choices were framed at all. The system was supposed to propose two-option forks (per CLAUDE.md), but the Pair never invoked propose_options or surfaced any decision — minimax vs heuristics, first-move randomness, X/O assignment, etc., were all decided unilaterally.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no scaffolding because there is no progression of questions. The entire solution is dumped in one turn with a post-hoc summary.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is friendly and the explanation is organized, but there is no back-and-forth — the user's second turn is essentially a self-directed code review with no further engagement from the Pair. Conversational dynamic is one-shot delivery, not pairing.

effectiveness.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).

friction.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).
